In my case, if I wanted scientific accuracy, I wouldn't be watching a Hollywood movie about creatures we can only speculate about.

==Spoilers==

The movie had the CEO of Biosyn looking like Tim Cook from Apple with bill gates's agenda (the genetically modified grains stuff), 
Henry Wu allegorizing a Wuhan Lab scientist with his super locust(covid IRL) but with a redemption ark cause gotta get it past Chinese censor board?, 
Oh they even had Elon Musk's "hyperloop" lmao.

The clone kid is not actually a clone but a GMO baby birthed by the original daughter who didn't actually die in an accident but had a rare disease she fixed by having a baby version of herself without the disease.

What else? Oh Giganotosaurus gets taken down by Rexy and a T-rex sized Erlikosaurus. The Actual Antagonist of the movies are GMO Locust. 

Not kidding yall. 

Old Cast:
Grant and Ellie visit biosyn at a biosyn Isle to collect evidence that ties the GMO locust to biosyn- Malcom already works for biosyn and helps them get the evidence- in between the clone kid is abducted by biosyn and brought to the island cause WU wants to study her to reverse his mistake with the locust. They both end up crossing each other's paths trying to escape biosyn. Claire and Grady hook up with a smuggler to get to the isle and rescue the the clone kid aka their adopted daughter. 

Dinosaurs are used more of a plot device in the movie- There are raptors who like indo killed anyone who a laser is pointed at, The feather raptor encounter happens between the smuggler and Grady, Claire has an encounter Erlikosaurus, and when they're all together the Giganotosaurus is after them.

Unbeleivable. My entire childhood (i would say) was/is based around my love for dinosaurs and that was all made possible by this movie franchise. i am in absolute awe of what will happen and this is just blowing my mind. I dont care if the plot sucks, i just want to watch the movie. I love the series and i thank universal for giving me an amazing childhood and the franchise will ALWAYS have a place in my heart. Thank you so much for doing this, to the cast, crew and everyone involved i cannot thank you enough. I am so happy and this trailer sends chills down my spine and is the ONLY trailer to ever make me cry of joy. whilst i am unbelaiveably excited to watch this movie, i am devastated how this may be the final movie. I will cherish this. I am so grateful to have the og cast back and i am still shaking after watching this. Again, thank you to the moon and back and have an absolutely wonderful life. Thank you.

I truly love how natural and organic the dinos now look, with the effects technology getting so much better so quickly. That simple shot of Animal Loving Navy Guy being chased while on motorcycle by a velociraptor running along the edge on the wall is really sweet. Slow it down and study the motion, very natural, very well executed.

This will probably seem like the year's most wtf movie ever but even if it is, I'll still be all over it. Besides, it's got the original three in it. Contrived as hell but I'll take it. Besides, Money Lady and Animal Loving Navy Guy did kinda grow on me. It's all cool.

It becomes worse when you realize there are only 3 breeding pairs meaning there would be a 0% chance of long time survival and a very easy neutralization process
